name: Dynast Bram

abilities.name: Cloak of Spines
abilities.text: Once per activation. After an attack targeting this model fails, the attacker gains an Injured token.

abilities.name: Regal Swordsman
abilities.text: When this model declares an attack, it may remove a Shielded token to receive a (t) and a suit of its choice to its Skl.

abilities.name: Resilient
abilities.text: Attacks targeting this model reduce raises they receive by 1 (to a minimum of 0).

triggers.name: A Generous Gift...
triggers.text: Summon a Gift of Thorns into base contact with the target.

actions.name: Biting Insult
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this action receives a raise, make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

triggers.name: On Your Heels
triggers.text: Place this model into base contact with the target.

triggers.name: A Generous Gift...
triggers.text: Summon a Gift of Thorns into base contact with the target.

actions.name: Weak, All of You
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Engaged ally only. Deal 1 damage to the target. Place this model into base contact with a model engaging the target. Then, this model may declare a (melee) attack, which receives a (-).

triggers.name: Show You How It's Done
triggers.text: Increase the Dmg of all of this model's attacks by +1 until the end of the current activation.

merge_warnings: Name mismatch: front='Dynast Bram' back='Dynasty Bram'
